name: Mustard/Wine Marinated Lamb Chops
recipeIngredient: 4 each Sirloin lamb chops 1 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub both sides of the lamb chops with mustard.
2. Sprinkle the chops with salt and pepper.
3. Cover with red wine and marinate overnight in the refrigerator.
4. Just before broiling or pan-frying to desired doneness, rub the chops again with mustard.
